channel.title: The Modern Schoolhouse
channel.description: A K-12 education blog on school choice, teaching trends, and student success

item.title: STEM + Online Charter School: A Smarter Path to College
item.description: More online charter schools lead with STEM and college-prep rigor. Here's what that means for families choosing K-12 education in 2025.

item.title: The Microschool Surge: What Families Are Choosing in 2025
item.description: Microschool enrollment is surging in 2025. Here's what's driving families to tiny schools, how they differ from charters, and what it means for K-12 choice.

item.title: Why Families Are Choosing Flexible Charter Schools in 2025
item.description: Hybrid and independent-study charter schools are growing fast. Here's what the 2025 data says about why families are choosing flex models—and how students perform.

item.title: Charter School Accountability: What It Really Means
item.description: Charter schools trade autonomy for accountability. Here's what that bargain actually means, what the research shows, and what parents should ask before enrolling.

item.title: Why Charter Schools Lose Teachers (And How to Stop It)
item.description: Charter schools lose teachers at higher rates than traditional public schools. Here's what the data shows—and what smart charter leaders do differently to retain great educators.

item.title: Charter Schools in the Age of ESAs: Where Do They Fit?
item.description: ESA and voucher programs are expanding fast across the U.S. Here's how charter schools remain a distinct, powerful option for families navigating today's school choice landscape.

item.title: Student Mental Health: Why Your School Choice Matters
item.description: The K-12 mental health crisis is real—and the school a child attends shapes their access to support. Here's what parents need to know in 2025.

item.title: How STEM Pathways Are Closing the College-Readiness Gap
item.description: Structured STEM pathways and maker spaces are reshaping college readiness in K-12 charter schools. Here's what the research shows and why it matters for families.

item.title: How Charter Schools Are Turning High School Into a College Head Start
item.description: Dual enrollment lets high schoolers earn real college credits for free. Here's how charter schools are making it happen — and what students actually gain.

item.title: Why Civics Is Making a Comeback in K-12 Schools
item.description: America's 250th birthday is fueling a K-12 civics revival. Here's what the research shows — and what it means for families choosing a school.

item.title: Why Students Skip: The Chronic Absenteeism Fix
item.description: Chronic absenteeism has nearly doubled since 2019. Here's what the data says about why students skip—and what actually brings them back to school.

item.title: Tuition-Free Online Charter Schools: What Families Get
item.description: Tuition-free online charter schools offer K–12 families licensed teachers, provided tech, and flexible scheduling at zero cost. Here's what that really means.

item.title: Why Community Ties Drive Real Student Success
item.description: New 2025 research shows K-12 schools that embed community engagement into their mission see stronger attendance, better grades, and lower dropout rates.

item.title: The Mental Health Factor in School Choice (2025)
item.description: Student mental health is now a top school-choice factor. See the 2025 data and how charter schools are stepping up where traditional schools fall short.

item.title: What Parents Really Want From Schools in 2025
item.description: New surveys show 75% of parents actively considered new schools in 2025. Here's what they're looking for—and what it means for school choice.

item.title: Why Character and Rigor Both Belong in K-8
item.description: The best K-8 schools don't choose between character and academics—they prove the two reinforce each other. Here's what the research shows.

item.title: School Choice Now Pays for Therapy — Not Just Tuition
item.description: ESA programs in 20+ states now cover ABA therapy, tutoring & more — not just tuition. Here's what families of kids with disabilities need to know.

item.title: Why Students Skip School—and How to Win Them Back
item.description: Chronic absenteeism has doubled since COVID. Learn why students aren't showing up and which school strategies are actually bringing them back.

item.title: Do Online Charter Students Miss Out Socially?
item.description: Is socialization really a problem at online charter schools? Here's what the research says—and how virtual K-12 programs are building real community.

item.title: Is Online Charter School Right for Your Child?
item.description: Not every student thrives in online school. Here's an honest, research-backed guide to knowing if a virtual K-12 charter is the right fit for your family.
